description:
Knob drag logic is duplicated across 3+ components with slight variations:
- web/src/EqKnob.tsx lines 38-61
- web/src/synth-ui/SynthKnob.tsx lines 53-74
- web/src/PanKnob.tsx

Fader drag logic duplicated between:
- web/src/VolumeFader.tsx lines 44-59
- web/src/synth-ui/SynthFader.tsx

Fix: Extract a shared useDragControl(min, max, sensitivity, onChange) hook.
All knob/fader components should consume this hook.
title: Extract reusable drag-control hook from duplicated knob/fader logic
